mapper.select:
SELECT h.id, h.name, h.total_votes as totalVotes, h.is_recommended as isRecommended, COALESCE(SUM(v.vote_count), 0) as periodVotes FROM hotword h LEFT JOIN hotword_vote v ON h.id = v.hotword_id
h.status = 1
AND (v.create_time IS NULL OR v.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY))
AND (v.create_time IS NULL OR v.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY))
AND (v.create_time IS NULL OR v.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY))
GROUP BY h.id, h.name, h.total_votes, h.is_recommended ORDER BY
h.total_votes periodVotes
DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT h.id, h.name, h.total_votes as totalVotes, COALESCE(SUM(v.vote_count), 0) as periodVotes FROM hotword h LEFT JOIN hotword_vote v ON h.id = v.hotword_id
h.status = 1
AND v.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY) AND v.create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND v.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND v.create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND v.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND v.create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY h.id, h.name, h.total_votes ORDER BY periodVotes DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT h.id, h.name, h.definition, h.example, h.tags, h.image_url as imageUrl, h.total_votes as totalVotes, h.status, h.is_recommended as isRecommended, h.user_id as userId, h.create_time as createTime, u.nickname as authorNickname, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM hotword h LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON h.user_id = u.id WHERE h.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR h.definition LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR h.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY h.status ASC, h.total_votes DESC

SELECT h.id, h.name, h.definition, h.example, h.tags, h.image_url as imageUrl, h.total_votes as totalVotes, h.status, h.is_recommended as isRecommended, h.user_id as userId, h.create_time as createTime, u.nickname as authorNickname, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM hotword h LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON h.user_id = u.id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY h.create_time DESC
SELECT id FROM hotword WHERE status = 1 AND (last_vote_time IS NULL OR last_vote_time < #{expireTime}) AND create_time < #{expireTime}

SELECT h.id, h.name, h.definition, h.example, h.tags, h.image_url as imageUrl, h.total_votes as totalVotes, h.status, h.is_recommended as isRecommended, h.user_id as userId, h.create_time as createTime, u.nickname as authorNickname, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM hotword h LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON h.user_id = u.id WHERE h.id = #{id}
